creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text: I see the same issue on a Lenovo T16 with an i5-1235U processor running FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #6 main-n267556-69748e62e82a. So, not exclusive to Dell. Looks like it might be an Alder Lake issue. Reports on other series an other recent CPUs would narrow it down further.
